expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
Scene uses Points or BufferGeometry to render particles
expectations.evidence: THREE.WebGLRenderer with particle system using sprite-based AdditiveBlending found

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
expectations.evidence: LEFT: Three.js Canvas section and right controls panel found in HTML structure

expectations.text: Right panel has a slider for particle count
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='sl-count' min=100 max=20000 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a slider for particle speed
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='sl-speed' min=0.1 max=5.0 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a slider for spread/radius
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='sl-spread' min=0.5 max=10.0 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a color picker input
expectations.evidence: input type='color' id='color-picker' plus color swatches present

expectations.text: Right panel has a Randomize button
expectations.evidence: button id='btn-randomize' with Randomize All label present

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
